subject: [PATCH 1/4] iova: switch to augmented rbtree for log(n) allocation

2026-05-18.patch_summary: This patch improves the performance of the IOVA (Input/Output Virtual Address) allocator by switching to an augmented rbtree data structure, which allows for log(n) allocation time instead of O(n). The new implementation tracks free gaps between nodes and prunes subtrees with insufficient gap size during search. This addresses a long-standing issue where heavy fragmentation could cause 20+ second delays and softlockups in the IOVA allocator.
